description: Create a Marimekko (Mosaic) visualization in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset to analyze market structure. The visualization should map 'Region' to the category, 'Product Category' to color, 'Sales' to column width, and 'Profit' to segment height. This configuration allows for comparing profit contributions within regions while simultaneously viewing the relative revenue size of each region. Save the workbook as 'Market_Structure'.
